external_claim: Packet lacks Phase 5 checkpoint and Phase 6A formula patch summary.
local_verification: False. The sent zip contains 01_phase5_checkpoint/PHASE_5_CHECKPOINT.md and 02_formula_patch/PHASE_6A_FORMULA_PATCH_PASS.md plus formula configs and movement audits.
recommended_action: No model patch. Improve future auditor prompt to instruct auditor to inspect folder tree before declaring missing files.

local_verification: False for the active Phase 6 preview. v4_preview_outputs.csv reports model_v4_review_only_0.2.0.

external_claim: Veteran stars such as Saquon Barkley, Derrick Henry, George Kittle, Travis Kelce, Mark Andrews, and Sam LaPorta have near-zero values because all evidence is missing.
local_verification: False against the sent Phase 6 preview. Saquon=76.234, Henry=71.223, Kittle=49.714, Kelce=42.139, Andrews=41.037, LaPorta=39.227. Their unavailable section is projection, not all evidence.
roster_decision_impact: None, but this false claim should not drive repair work.
recommended_action: No source repair for this claim. Keep projection-missing warnings visible.

external_claim: Incoming rookies are zero or near-zero with strong confidence despite missing all major evidence.
local_verification: Confirmed. Incoming rookies show missing production, first-down, usage, snap, projection, age, and young-prior sections while confidence_label is strong.
roster_decision_impact: Low immediate roster impact unless an incoming rookie is being compared against roster decisions; high trust impact because confidence semantics are wrong.
draft_final_impact: High draft/final impact because incoming rookie values and confidence are part of draft surfaces.
evidence: Fernando Mendoza=1.44 strong; Jeremiyah Love=0.0 strong; Carnell Tate=0.0 strong; Jordyn Tyson=0.0 strong; Kenyon Sadiq=0.8 strong with unavailable evidence sections.
recommended_action: Patch confidence rules so no-data incoming rookies cannot show strong confidence. Add fixture for incoming rookie missing evidence.

external_claim: Incoming rookies need a prospect/rookie prior rather than all-zero value.
local_verification: Likely bug or missing-data policy issue. Phase 6 intentionally keeps weak-evidence young rows reviewable, but incoming rookie lane should not imply strong certainty when all inputs are missing.
roster_decision_impact: Low for pre-declaration roster decisions unless incoming rookies are compared to rostered players.
evidence: Incoming rookies have unavailable young_player_prior and no college/prospect contribution.
recommended_action: Add a review-only incoming rookie prior policy or exclude incoming rookies from v4 roster-promotion gate until rookie board data exists.

external_claim: QB suppression is too binary; Josh Allen and Lamar Jackson remain too close to elite RB/WR assets while other QBs collapse.
local_verification: Likely formula concern. Current Phase 6 preview has Josh Allen=69.240 and Lamar Jackson=67.218, comparable to Ja'Marr Chase=67.650 and above most elite WRs. This matters because Lamar is on Niners.
roster_decision_impact: High: Lamar is a Niners top-five-rule player, so QB valuation affects forced-release pain and roster strategy.
evidence: v4_preview_outputs.csv; Phase 6 named review only checked Lamar below top named RB/WR, which is too weak a fixture.
recommended_action: Run targeted QB replacement-value patch pass. Strengthen sanity fixture to compare elite QBs against elite RB/WR tier in 10-team 1QB.

external_claim: TE suppression wipes out elite TEs when evidence is absent.
local_verification: Mostly false against Phase 6 preview. Elite TE values are not near-zero: McBride=58.960, Bowers=57.249, Kittle=49.714, Kelce=42.139, Andrews=41.037, LaPorta=39.227. Projection gaps remain visible.
roster_decision_impact: Low immediate Niners roster impact except Hockenson/Ferguson/Strange context.
evidence: v4_preview_outputs.csv and source coverage rows show projection gaps, not total evidence absence.
recommended_action: No broad TE repair from this claim. Re-check after QB/incoming-rookie patches.

external_claim: WR values are systematically low versus RBs because route and first-down evidence are unavailable.
local_verification: Partially valid formula/source concern. Route metrics remain unavailable by design; first-down historical data is present but direct first-down projections are estimated/missing. Phase 6 fixtures passed, but WR/RB balance should remain monitored.
classification: source gap accepted limitation / formula concern
roster_decision_impact: Medium: affects WR-heavy roster decisions and trade framing.
evidence: Warnings show route_participation_unavailable/routes_run_unavailable/TPRR/YPRR for WR/TE; Phase 6 movement audit found no unexpected movement.
recommended_action: Do not patch blindly. Re-evaluate after QB/confidence fixes; consider strengthening RB/WR fixtures if external audit continues to flag this.

external_claim: Missing data is visible in receipts and source coverage.
local_verification: Confirmed strength. Missing and proxy-only evidence is visible in v4_source_coverage_rows, v4_receipt_rows, and v4_warning_rows.
evidence: 660 receipt rows, 660 source coverage rows, 1491 warning rows, all warning severity review.

external_claim: Market/liquidity and league rank should remain separate from private football value.
local_verification: Already handled. Phase 6 named review marks market and league-rank separation ready.
evidence: PHASE_6_NAMED_PLAYER_REVIEW.md: market and league-rank separation ready.

external_claim: Phase 6 external audit verdict says needs source/data repair and another formula patch pass.
local_verification: Partially accepted. Broad source/data repair is not supported by local verification of veteran values, but targeted confidence repair and targeted QB formula review are supported.
roster_decision_impact: Blocks app promotion until targeted fixes are run and re-audited.
draft_final_impact: Blocks final readiness; draft readiness also blocked by draft-pool gates.
evidence: False veteran/source claims, but true incoming-rookie confidence issue and plausible QB suppression issue.
recommended_action: Run a focused Phase 7 repair pass: incoming-rookie confidence/prior policy, QB replacement-value suppression, fixture strengthening, then regenerate/re-audit.
